headline: ADR-0003's skin mechanism freeze is LIFTED (Adrian, 2026-07-16: 'more randomization of the design, automatically per site' + explicit 'build skins now') — PR closes #140, building on the site-factory initiative (#148). Ships the mechanism only, no skin content yet: a top-level `design?: SkinId` field on `ClientConfigDraft`, merged by `applyDesignSkin()` with the exact override-only pattern of `applyContentPack()` (explicit config wins, `design` stripped before Zod — never touches `ClientConfigSchema`, so `ops-shape.snapshot.json` re-ran byte-identical, no ops schema-drift). One placeholder skin, `classic`, pins every `layout.sections.*.variant` + brand default to today's ordinary schema defaults — proven byte-identical two ways: a unit test and a `dist/` diff on demo-pressure-pros with/without the field. Real skins (warm-editorial first, #141) are deliberate follow-ups, not built here. `pnpm check`, `pnpm test` (workspace, --concurrency=1 to dodge this sandbox's 4-core turbo contention — an environment artifact, not a regression), and `pnpm build` all green. Flagged, not fixed here: hirobius/ops's vendored lib/schema/index.mjs never carried `applyContentPack`'s merge logic either (pre-existing gap) — porting `applyDesignSkin` there is a follow-up so the ops agent can eventually emit `design`. Engine frozen pending ops cutover (#10). Pre-revenue — no paying client yet.
next: Port realtor warm-editorial as skin #1 (#141) onto the now-built `design` mechanism — first real skin content under epic #128

hirobius/ops follow-up: port applyContentPack + applyDesignSkin merge logic into ops's vendored lib/schema/index.mjs so the ops agent can pick a contentPack/design skin (pre-existing gap, not blocking this repo)
OUTREACH: get the first paying client — the mechanism is ready for skin #1, but a skin needs client-facing variety to pay off

Ralph idle-watchdog + reconcile fix DONE fleet-wide; make `Engine tests` (hirobius/ralph) and each repo's ralph-gate the required branch-protection checks; triage ops's pre-existing red pnpm-audit gate (55 vulns, non-required); fix the ralph README's `git tag -f v1` line — v1 is a branch
Work the open needs-human backlog: trust/conversion fields (#87), per-vertical content packs (#85), analytics/conversion events (#84), aesthetics dials (#86)
Set real form.accessKey (Web3Forms) + hcaptchaSiteKey before any prospect outreach
Delete the frozen packages/agent engine once ops's first live generate passes (#10)
Re-sync hirobius/ops's vendored lib/schema (index.mjs, presets.mjs) with the #155/#157 brand.fontPairing + brand.shadow fields — still outstanding from before this session
blocked: Autonomous site generation blocked on ANTHROPIC_API_KEY (in ops)
Engine delete (#10) waits on ops's first live generate
#84/#85/#87/#35/#41/#27 need a human decision before Ralph can pick them up
